title: podman-compose fails with long `--project-name`: cgroup not set & container not found errors
body:
### Issue Description

podman-compose fails with long `--project-name`: cgroup not set & container not found errors

### Steps to reproduce the issue


```bash
podman-compose --project-name hvzhongtaiaiassistantdevcontaine -f .devcontainer/
docker-compose.yml up -d
```
works normal

When using a long --project-name with podman-compose, the following command:


```bash
podman-compose --project-name hvzhongtaiaiassistantdevcontainer -f .devcontainer/
docker-compose.yml up -d
```


### Describe the results you received

```bash
Error: pod aea4b01dbe1d29e73e82e53381f632e423162753b5e10fbcd956beb919515416 cgroup is not set: internal libpod error
Error: unable to start container "f6508d9503d85c108bd717173319583d63d1c4f19709f73565d73aaaea67de19": did not receive systemd slice as cgroup parent when using systemd to manage cgroups: invalid argument
```


### Describe the results you expected

podman-compose should handle long project names gracefully

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body:
podman-compose is a separate project and not maintained by us (the podman team) so I suggets you report this there https://github.com/containers/podman-compose/
Or provide a reproduce without using compose and just the podman commands

To add to @Luap99 comment if you decide to report it in the podman-compose repo please also provide a `docker-compose.yml` file and the `--verbose` output from `podman-compose` as I can't reproduce this.

A reviewer has determined we need more information to understand the reported issue.  A comment on what is missing should be provided. Be certain you:

* provide an exact reproducer where possible
* verify you have provided all relevant information - minimum is `podman info`
* answer any follow up questions

If no response to the `needs-info` is provided in 30 days, this issue may be closed by our stale bot.

For more information on reporting issues on this repository, consult our [issue guide](ISSUE.md).

@ninja-quokka @Luap99 

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/25c3cc90-8b9a-4247-b616-a3f6b452f518)

# app.dockerfile
```docker
FROM m.daocloud.io/docker.io/library/python:3
```

# docker-compose.yml
```yml
services:
  app:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: "./app.dockerfile"
    ports:
      - 5173:5173
      - 8000:8000
    command: sleep infinity
```

Exec command `podman-compose --verbose --project-name aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer up -d`

```
INFO:podman_compose:['podman', '--version', '']
INFO:podman_compose:using podman version: 5.5.1
DEBUG:podman_compose:** excluding: set()
INFO:podman_compose:['podman', 'inspect', '-t', 'image', '-f', '{{.Id}}', 'aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer_app']
INFO:podman_compose:['podman', 'ps', '--filter', 'label=io.podman.compose.project=aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer', '-a', '--format', '{{ index .Labels "io.podman.compose.config-hash"}}']
INFO:podman_compose:podman pod exists pod_aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer
INFO:podman_compose:exit code: 0
INFO:podman_compose:['podman', 'network', 'exists', 'aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer_default']
INFO:podman_compose:podman create --name=aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer_app_1 --pod=pod_aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer --label io.podman.compose.config-hash=a8f52e6901dc7936b6b722ef394c637c0e99dfd8e314deca797649e05e203f9f --label io.podman.compose.project=aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer --label io.podman.compose.version=1.4.1 --label PODMAN_SYSTEMD_UNIT=podman-compose@aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer.service --label com.docker.compose.project=aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer --label com.docker.compose.project.working_dir=/home/lh/test-podman-1 --label com.docker.compose.project.config_files=docker-compose.yml --label com.docker.compose.container-number=1 --label com.docker.compose.service=app --network=aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer_default:alias=app -p 5173:5173 -p 8000:8000 aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer_app sleep infinity
Error: pod d123137862c77bd724789eb038ebe54f8f7705fed34698a1292faa82e94bf281 cgroup is not set: internal libpod error
INFO:podman_compose:exit code: 125
DEBUG:podman_compose:Checking dependencies prior to container aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer_app_1 start
DEBUG:podman_compose:Starting task for container aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer_app_1
INFO:podman_compose:podman start aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer_app_1
Error: no container with name or ID "aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer_app_1" found: no such container
INFO:podman_compose:exit code: 125
```

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a29a84b1-35a0-465d-8d5f-6c9d5934060e)

Exec command `podman create --name=aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer_app_1 --pod=pod_aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer --label io.podman.compose.config-hash=a8f52e6901dc7936b6b722ef394c637c0e99dfd8e314deca797649e05e203f9f --label io.podman.compose.project=aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer --label io.podman.compose.version=1.4.1 --label PODMAN_SYSTEMD_UNIT=podman-compose@aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer.service --label com.docker.compose.project=aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer --label com.docker.compose.project.working_dir=/home/lh/test-podman-1 --label com.docker.compose.project.config_files=docker-compose.yml --label com.docker.compose.container-number=1 --label com.docker.compose.service=app --network=aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer_default:alias=app -p 5173:5173 -p 8000:8000 aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer_app sleep infinity`

```
Error: pod d123137862c77bd724789eb038ebe54f8f7705fed34698a1292faa82e94bf281 cgroup is not set: internal libpod error
```

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/20d0edab-a585-449e-895a-95a7b4da1c0b)

normal situation (name is **aiassociationanalysisdevcontaine**)
Exec command: `podman-compose --verbose --project-name aiassociationanalysisdevcontaine up -d`

```bash
INFO:podman_compose:['podman', '--version', '']
INFO:podman_compose:using podman version: 5.5.1
DEBUG:podman_compose:** excluding: set()
INFO:podman_compose:['podman', 'inspect', '-t', 'image', '-f', '{{.Id}}', 'aiassociationanalysisdevcontaine_app']
INFO:podman_compose:['podman', 'ps', '--filter', 'label=io.podman.compose.project=aiassociationanalysisdevcontaine', '-a', '--format', '{{ index .Labels "io.podman.compose.config-hash"}}']
INFO:podman_compose:podman pod exists pod_aiassociationanalysisdevcontaine
INFO:podman_compose:exit code: 0
INFO:podman_compose:['podman', 'network', 'exists', 'aiassociationanalysisdevcontaine_default']
INFO:podman_compose:podman create --name=aiassociationanalysisdevcontaine_app_1 --pod=pod_aiassociationanalysisdevcontaine --label io.podman.compose.config-hash=a8f52e6901dc7936b6b722ef394c637c0e99dfd8e314deca797649e05e203f9f --label io.podman.compose.project=aiassociationanalysisdevcontaine --label io.podman.compose.version=1.4.1 --label PODMAN_SYSTEMD_UNIT=podman-compose@aiassociationanalysisdevcontaine.service --label com.docker.compose.project=aiassociationanalysisdevcontaine --label com.docker.compose.project.working_dir=/home/lh/test-podman-1 --label com.docker.compose.project.config_files=docker-compose.yml --label com.docker.compose.container-number=1 --label com.docker.compose.service=app --network=aiassociationanalysisdevcontaine_default:alias=app -p 5173:5173 -p 8000:8000 aiassociationanalysisdevcontaine_app sleep infinity
dc2651494e30647fe719d5fb4e480d6adc07d27975017f017e799eb5607be3e8
INFO:podman_compose:exit code: 0
DEBUG:podman_compose:Checking dependencies prior to container aiassociationanalysisdevcontaine_app_1 start
DEBUG:podman_compose:Starting task for container aiassociationanalysisdevcontaine_app_1
INFO:podman_compose:podman start aiassociationanalysisdevcontaine_app_1
aiassociationanalysisdevcontaine_app_1
INFO:podman_compose:exit code: 0
```

It appears that only the command
podman-compose --verbose --project-name aiassociationanalysisdevcontainer up -d
triggers the issue, whereas
podman-compose --verbose --project-name aiassociationanalysisdevcontainek up -d
runs without any problems.

Changing just the last character of the project name from r to k avoids the error

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6d028005-adaf-467d-bc1b-5d4fdada7266)

It seems that there was an abnormal pod. After I ran `podman pod rm -f pod_hvzhongtaiaiassistantdevcontainer`, Podman returned to normal.
